CustomField.description: Utilization Validation: Creates a confirmed or conflict snapshot and validates snapshot TSN/CSN against the respective utilization TSN/CSN. Utilization Correction: Always creates a confirmed snapshot, and generates a correction-type utilization in the system for the mentioned period. Utilize the Correction type Snapshots for any ad-hoc TSN/CSN corrections needed for components.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Utilization Validation: Creates a confirmed or conflict snapshot and validates snapshot TSN/CSN against the respective utilization TSN/CSN. Utilization Correction: Always creates a confirmed snapshot, and generates a correction-type utilization in the system for the mentioned period. Utilize the Correction type Snapshots for any ad-hoc TSN/CSN corrections needed for components.
CustomField.label: Type
